repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Gay mens popular fiction collection
did.abstract: Erotic and pornographic novels on gay men's subjects, including such themes as muscle, cowboy, sado-masochism, sailors, and leather, and occurring in such series as Parisian Press, Blueboy Library, Greenleaf, HIS 69, and many others.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Erotic and pornographic novels on gay men's subjects, including such themes as muscle, cowboy, sado-masochism, sailors, and leather, and occurring in such series as Parisian Press, Blueboy Library, Greenleaf, HIS 69, and many others.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: Books are listed alphabetically by author. Title, publisher, series and series number if applicable (-0- if not), and date are also given.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gay men's popular fiction collection, #7456. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
